creator: jrm@freebsd.org
text:
I'm not able to reproduce this in poudriere using a 10.2-RELEASE amd64 jail with the default options for math/R and all dependent ports.

http://pkg.awarnach.mathstat.dal.ca/data/102amd64-default/2016-08-08_01h03m24s/logs/R-3.3.1_3.log

Can you confirm you are using version 3.3.1_3 of the math/R port?

Can you provide a build log and a list of which options are on/off?
